work_units: bounded implementation slice traced to Product SOT requirements
release_or_block_rule: Release is blocked until verification, review and required gates pass.

skipped_artifacts.reason: No legacy/brownfield scope in this slice.

prd: Short product requirement summary or ref.
full_product_plan: map every meaningful Product SOT requirement to work, proof, blocker, deferred item, explicit non-goal or human decision
slice_plan: bounded slice and ordering; this does not reduce Product SOT scope
slice_execution_plan: execute only ready slices whose work-unit contracts include verification, expected result, STOP conditions and evidence refs
security_architecture_ref: security-architecture-plan not required for R0/R1 unless elevated
